---
title: "Presenter Info"
description: "Talk & poster guidelines, timing, file formats."
date: 2026-02-13
categories: [presenters, logistics]
---

## Oral presentations
- Oral presentations will be 20 minutes of talk followed by 10 minutes of Q&A.

## Posters
- There will be two traditional in-person poster sessions and an online "flash talk" poster session. 
- The in-person poster sessions will be held on the first floor of Stata Center. We recommend printing your poster on A1-sized paper. 
- The online poster session will consist of 10-minute pre-recorded flash talks followed by 5-minute live Q&A sessions. If you are presenting your poster online, please send us a 10-minute recording of your presentation by the end of day on April 10 (Friday). Feel free to present with either slides or posters.
